features: Cross-platform build support: run.sh (Linux/macOS) with full parity to run.ps1
Makefile with corrected flags matching run.sh argument format
GitHub Actions CI workflow: test on push, cross-compile 6 OS/arch targets
GitHub Actions Release workflow: auto-release on v* tags with compression and checksums
Interactive TUI mode (gitmap interactive / gitmap i) with Bubble Tea
TUI repo browser with fuzzy search and multi-select
TUI batch actions: pull, exec, status across selected repos
TUI group management: browse, create, delete groups interactively
TUI status dashboard with live repo status view
Build System section added to Architecture docs page
Documentation site fully reflects all v2.14.0+ features
